description: A progressive repository dedicated to exploring Machine Learning. This project is updated continuously with source code, datasets, notebook tutorials, and framework implementations as I build them.

I'm a passionate Data Scientist and AI/ML Engineer with hands-on experience building intelligent systems using machine learning, deep learning, and natural language processing. I specialize in developing scalable models using frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Python  from research to real-world deployment.
AAGP: A machine learning framework for prediction of anti-aging peptides using diverse physicochemical and compositional features
Machine Learning and Explainable AI framework for malware behavior classification using API call sequences.
QUBE Engine  Graph-based Quantum Descriptor Learning Framework for Machine Learning
A Rust powered PyTorch-like Machine Learning framework.

A machine-learning framework that combines conditional variational autoencoders with spatial graph analysis to learn unsupervised phenotypic embeddings of complex tissue architectures from microscopy images.
Simple Framework to create game for my machine learning research testing AI
Tech Soft 3D tutorials of python CAD framework for machine learning development. Requires HOOPS AI
A lightweight, interpretable machinelearning framework that correlates findings from multiple SAST and DAST tools to reduce false positives and prioritize true vulnerabilities.

SmartHealth-IoT is a simulation-based remote patient monitoring framework that generates virtual smartwatch physiological streams, processes them through IoT-style ingestion, extracts sliding-window features, and predicts patient risk using VitalBoostNet. It combines machine-learning predictions .
A Python implementation of Linear Regression using Gradient Descent from scratch with NumPy, demonstrating iterative optimization and parameter learning without machine learning frameworks.

An advanced cryptocurrency trading bot and predictive analysis framework exploring the potential of automated "passive income" through machine learning. Features implementation of XGBoost, Random Forest, Transformer, and Reinforcement Learning for signal generation

feed-forward neural network built completely from scratch using Python and NumPy to solve the XOR classification problem. This project implements forward propagation, backpropagation, gradient descent, and weight updates manually without using machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch.
RL framework to study extrapolation in machine learning on a graph-coloring testbed
The PennyLane-Qrack plugin integrates the Qrack quantum computing framework with PennyLane's quantum machine learning capabilities.
Machine learning framework (Random Forest) to assess the impact of climate extremes on crop yield anomalies in Senegal using CMIP6 projections and SHAP analysis.
A deep learning-based forest wildfire detection system using computer vision and machine learning techniques for early fire detection and prevention.

This is a publicly-available code repository and resource for the research project 'From Hemodynamic Stability to Survival: A Validated Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Framework for ICU Shock Management with Machine-in-the-loop System'.

Solutions to the Machine Learning Compilation (MLC, mlc.ai) course exercises  TensorIR tensor programs, end-to-end model compilation, automatic program optimization, and framework integration with Apache TVM

This Guidance demonstrates how to optimize real-time bidding decisions across multiple machine learning models by deploying GPU-accelerated NVIDIA model architectures that run in parallel within an ARTF-compliant framework.
Machine learning framework for modeling glacier surface mass balance (SMB) and surface energy balance (SEB) using COSIPY output and ERA5-Land..

PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into proteinanion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.
AI-powered threat detection system combining anomaly detection, classification, and NLP to identify network intrusions, malware, and phishing attempts  built with Python and scikit-learn.
This repository contains the datasets used in the project "Text Emotion Detection Framework Using Machine Learning and Cross-Dataset Learning Techniques."
A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

Final Year B. Tech Project (ECE, IIITDM Kancheepuram) focused on Machine learning framework for capacitance prediction and material optimization of flexible supercapacitors using Random Forest, XGBoost, SVR, MLP and Stacked Ensemble models.
Explainable AI framework for predicting primary-dose COVID-19 vaccine hesitancy using machine learning, SHAP, and LIME to generate transparent global and local model explanations.

Using the latest version of Python 3 and the popular scikit-learn framework, this approach integrates algorithms with programming, guiding you step-by-step from the basics into the world of machine learning. You will gain more than just knowledge from a course; you will develop the ability to think critically and continuously.
Multi-Modal Machine Learning Framework for Social Media Addiction Risk Prediction Using Behavioural, Textual, and Demographic Data
DeepGNN is a framework for training machine learning models on large scale graph data.
It is a framework that validates the data that you give to your machine learning model during training as well as when you deploy it in real time environments.
Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Horizon Cryptocurrency Forecasting and Quantitative Risk Management

PCLP3 Project: Intelligent Data Modeling. This repository contains the implementation of an AI model that learns from dynamic data collected via API integration. The project showcases how to process complex API responses and feed them into a machine learning model built within the PCLP framework.
Machine learning-driven hybrid VLC-RF routing framework for congestion-aware UAV-assisted VANETs with Random Forest-based link prediction and utility-based adaptive routing.
Machine Learning framework for deterministic football simulation and predictive analytics.

Space Labs AI presents: A radiation-tolerant machine learning framework enabling neural networks to operate reliably in space environments. Features adaptive protection, Reed-Solomon error correction, and breakthrough architecture optimizations that improve performance under radiation.

A lightweight fine-tuned LLM framework for Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD) prediction and explainable clinical decision support. The project compares parameter-efficient LLMs with traditional machine learning models, demonstrating the trade-off between predictive performance and human-friendly explanations for trustworthy healthcare AI.

A machine learning framework for credit card fraud detection using Sparse Autoencoder-based feature extraction and XGBoost classification. The project addresses the challenge of highly imbalanced financial transaction data through preprocessing, feature learning, and model optimization.

A central hub documenting my machine learning journey. Includes step-by-step implementations of ML models, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and practical projects built while mastering data science frameworks.
Steps toward a Self-Sovereign paradigm of Machine Learning
Learn all about Machine Learning Tools, Libraries, Frameworks, Large Language Models (LLMs), and Training Models.
Behavioral machine learning framework for fraud detection using XGBoost and SHAP explainability.
AI-powered supervised machine learning framework with intelligent agents
Gradio framework is an open-source Python framework that allows developers to rapidly build interactive web applications and user interfaces (UIs) for machine learning models, APIs
A compiler for Level 1 and Level 2 (Machine Learning) of Abe AI framework
An explainable machine learning framework for forecasting agri-food carbon emissions using FAO/IPCC environmental data with SHAP-based model interpretability.
An Explainable AI (XAI) framework for genetic disease prediction using genomic biomarkers and machine learning models.

NeuralLink is a deep learningbased project that leverages neural network architectures for intelligent data analysis and prediction. The repository provides implementations of model development, training, evaluation, and inference using modern machine learning frameworks.
Implementation of an Ethical AI framework for financial risk prediction using Explainable AI and Machine Learning techniques.
Reproducible machine-learning and DeepCut-inspired neural thresholding framework for SEC accounting enforcement risk screening using public 10-K and 10-Q financial statements linked to AAER releases.
An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.
A machine learning framework designed to identify and classify fraudulent transactions within mobile payment systems
Adaptive AI-Powered Data Loss Prevention Framework for SMEs using Machine Learning and NLP
KI stack for DGX Spark as AI-server and PC as orchestrator with microservices, dispatcher, dagster pipeline framework and some pipelines (RAG, machine learning DAG)

Machine Learningdriven cybersecurity framework for IoT and smart city networks. Includes intrusion detection using Random Forest, SOC dashboard for monitoring, port scanning for vulnerability detection, IoT device discovery, and network traffic visualization using Python.
A Mojo-native machine learning framework built from the ground up for performance and flexibility.
A unified framework for machine learning collective variables for enhanced sampling simulations
Machine learning project implementing linear regression from scratch without ML frameworks.
A pure Rust implementation of TensorFlow, providing a full-featured machine learning framework with Rust's safety and performance.

An open-source framework for auditing the trustworthiness of clinical machine learning models through integrated evaluation of calibration, explainability, robustness, clinical utility, and cross-cohort validation.
Educational and research-oriented AI framework exploring machine learning from first principles, progressing from linear regression and autograd to attention and transformers.

An open-source framework for leakage-aware, uncertainty-calibrated, explainable and reproducible machine learning dedicated to trustworthy mental health risk assessment, reliability analysis, uncertainty quantification, model interpretability, and clinically informed decision support.

This repository collects practical resources for assessing, testing, documenting, and implementing responsible machine learning systems, including frameworks, evaluation tools, educational materials, and community guidance.

Blockchain-Based Federated Learning framework designed to defend against data and model poisoning attacks. This project combines secure distributed AI, blockchain-based integrity verification, and malicious update detection to improve trust, privacy, and robustness in collaborative machine learning.

I specialize in systems-level machine learning, high-performance C++ development, transformer-based NLP, and scalable AI deployment. I build frameworks, optimize performance, and ship real-world AI systems  not just experiments.

brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".
Machine Learning Framework Integrating Protein Language Models for Virulence Prediction in Protozoan Parasites
Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python
Double Machine Learning (DML) framework for causal inference in education: Teacher quality and learning outcomes in Tanzania.
Open-source Python framework for computational spectroscopy, spectral synthesis, hyperspectral analysis, and machine learning.

An intelligent, data-driven framework designed to monitor user interaction metrics in digital environments, classify attention states, and forecast focus trends over time using machine learning and time-series analysis.
an open-sourced highly automated machine learning Python framework for data-driven geochemistry discovery
Machine learning framework for predicting Hydrothermal Liquefaction (HTL) bio-oil yield using ensemble regression models and explainable AI.
APIs and resources for PyTorch, an open source machine learning framework for tensor computation and deep learning developed by Meta.
A deep learning framework built from scratch in NumPy/CuPy reverse-mode autograd to a GPT, with a custom CUDA kernel, every operation verified against PyTorch to float64 machine precision.

Developing a modular quantitative research engine in R that evaluates option strategies using Monte Carlo simulation, real option chain data, and statistical modeling. The framework generates, evaluates, and ranks strategies based on expected return and risk, with future plans for backtesting and machine learning.
Spatially validated machine learning framework for EPC prediction and retrofit optimisation using UK residential housing data.
A pipeline framework for developing video and image processing application. Supports multiple GPUs and Machine Learning tooklits
An AI-powered framework for assessing YouTube video quality using NLP, Machine Learning, sentiment analysis, spam detection, toxicity detection, and interactive dashboards.
An AI-powered framework for real-time air quality forecasting and localized AQI prediction using machine learning.

Developing a globally generalizable machine learning framework to assess forest fire susceptibility using near-real-time NDVI anomalies, LST, and meteorological data.

This repository showcases practical Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence projects completed using Python and modern ML frameworks. The projects cover supervised learning, natural language processing, computer vision, recommendation systems, and model deployment.

To design and implement a robust machine learning framework to forecast one-month-ahead stock volatility using historical price data, enhancing risk assessment capabilities and enabling data-driven portfolio diversification.
